name: LociTask
description: Upload binaries and get LOCI performance insights directly in Azure Pipelines
author: AuroraLabs

inputs.name: project
inputs.label: Project name
inputs.helpMarkDown: LOCI project name to tag analysis results. Auto-resolves to the Azure DevOps repository name (`Build.Repository.Name`) if not set.

inputs.name: binaries
inputs.label: Binaries
inputs.helpMarkDown: Newline-separated list of binary paths, glob patterns, or a directory.

inputs.name: target
inputs.label: Target version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Project version label for this run. Auto-resolves to '<branch>@<shortSHA>' if not set.

inputs.name: base
inputs.label: Base version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional base version to compare 'target' against. Auto-resolves to PR merge base on PR builds.

inputs.name: waitBase
inputs.label: Wait for base
inputs.helpMarkDown: Whether to wait for the base version's processing to finish before uploading the target. Required for comparison analysis.

inputs.name: scmToken
inputs.label: SCM access token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps PAT used by LOCI for SCM API calls (PR comment posting, `@loci-dev` chat, merge-base resolution). Provide a long-lived service-account PAT via a pipeline secret variable (e.g. `$(LOCI_AZURE_PAT)`).
